name: Multi-constraint response
note: Starts with 'Every': True, ends with '?': False, has number: True
response: Every year, 60 million people in Colombia and 30 million in Brazil grow coffee, providing over 60% of the world's coffee supply. The aroma and taste of these beans, nurtured in lush, volcanic soil, captivate palates around the globe, raising curious minds to explore the diverse flavors and cultural significance of this beloved drink. Every sip, therefore, holds the story of two significant coffee-producing nations, inviting further exploration into the world of coffee.
